nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore pattern configuration file for the Understand-Anything analysis tool, listing file and directory patterns to exclude from codebase scanning, with commented-out suggestions mirroring .gitignore entries.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty Python package initializer that marks the agents directory as a Python package, enabling imports from agent modules.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty Python package initializer that marks the tools directory as a Python package, enabling imports from tool modules.

nodes.name: route.ts
nodes.summary: Next.js App Router API route that proxies chat task requests from the frontend to the FastAPI backend's /orchestrate endpoint, normalizing the response shape and handling errors including unreachable backend.

nodes.name: POST
nodes.summary: Handles POST requests to the /api/chat route by forwarding the task payload to the FastAPI /orchestrate endpoint and returning normalized agent results or error responses.

nodes.name: globals.css
nodes.summary: Global CSS stylesheet for the Next.js UI that establishes base styles, Tailwind CSS layer directives, and custom design token overrides for the dark-themed chat interface.

nodes.name: layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Root Next.js layout component that sets page metadata (title 'Maybach', description 'Autonomous agent system') and wraps all pages in an HTML shell with antialiased sans-serif font styling.

nodes.name: next-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: Auto-generated Next.js TypeScript environment declaration file that references Next.js type definitions; should not be edited manually.

nodes.name: next.config.mjs
nodes.summary: Next.js configuration file with default settings, providing the configuration object that controls build and runtime behavior of the Next.js frontend.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: NPM package manifest for the maybach-ui Next.js frontend, declaring dependencies on Next.js 14, React 18, react-markdown with GFM support, and dev dependencies for TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.

nodes.name: postcss.config.mjs
nodes.summary: PostCSS configuration enabling Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins for CSS processing in the Next.js build pipeline.

nodes.name: tailwind.config.ts
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark-themed design system with custom surface color palette, Inter/JetBrains Mono font families, and a purple accent color (#7c6af7) for the chat UI.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the Next.js UI enabling strict mode, ESNext modules with bundler resolution, JSX preserve, path alias (@/* → ./*), and Next.js plugin integration.
